title: Top 10 Must-See Movies of 2021
description: The article highlights some of the standout movies of 2021, including Dune, The French Dispatch, The Power of the Dog, The Lost Daughter, The Tragedy of Macbeth, No Time to Die, The Green Knight, The Suicide Squad, C'mon C'mon, and The Last Duel. These movies span a variety of genres and styles, from science fiction epics to emotional dramas to action-packed superhero films.
